accurate.why: Accurate; the definition of Parkinson's as a progressive brain disorder is correct context.

states_purpose.why: States HHS must carry out a Parkinson's project.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Implicitly conveys new HHS duties; amendment to PHS Act not named but effect captured.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the council comprises federal and nonfederal stakeholders.

effective_dates.why: Notes provisions terminate at end of 2035.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures national plan, care improvement, annual assessment, advisory council, and sunset at a high level.

correct_entities.why: HHS and the advisory council correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
